name: GenosSRV — GenosDB Fallback Server
description: Always-on superpeer for a GenosDB room: durable memory, availability anchor and optional 24/7 governance authority. One file, zero dependencies.

GDB_ROOM.description: Database name — must match your app's gdb(name).

GDB_CELLS.description: Set to 1 if your app uses rtc: { cells } (Cellular Mesh transport).

GDB_SM_KEY.description: Signing identity: a BIP39 mnemonic or a 0x private key. Enables the superadmin role — its derived address must be in your clients' sm.superAdmins list.

GDB_SUPERADMINS.description: Comma-separated superadmin addresses (the same constitution list your clients ship).

GDB_SM_RULES.description: Governance rules as inline JSON — the same rules your application declares. E.g. [{"if":{"role":"guest"},"then":{"assignRole":"user"}}]
